uk4:
Hello world,
I decided to share my self-earned wisdom today. I have a couple things to say.
1: Life is like a cake. Sometimes it can get messy, but there are always the good parts in between the messy parts.
2: Speaking from personal expirience, If you love someone, please dont be scared to tell them. In this day and age, people are scared of their feelings. If you dont tell that person, you will feel like you failed yourself, (ask me how I know lol) and you might think you will feel better if you dont tell them you have feelings for them in the beggining, but that is wrong.
Much love to all you who recieve this. Take my advice, and have a great day <3 May 9th 2025
